message:
feat: enhance object model with ES2020 methods, attestation-aware safe mode, and extension host lifecycle

Object Model (object_model.rs, +1215 lines):
- Implement Object.values(), Object.entries(), Object.defineProperties(), and
  Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptors() with full ES2020 semantics
- Add for-in enumeration with prototype chain traversal, cycle detection, and depth limits
- Enhance proxy invariant checking for non-configurable non-writable properties
- Refactor descriptor invariant validation for improved readability and control flow

Attestation-Aware Safe Mode Fallback (safe_mode_fallback.rs, +697 lines):
- Add AttestationHealth classification (Valid/VerificationFailed/EvidenceExpired/
  EvidenceUnavailable) for risk-stratified fallback routing
- Define operational impact tiers (HighImpact/Standard/LowImpact) and autonomous
  action taxonomy (Quarantine/Terminate/EmergencyGrant)
- Integrate receipt verifier pipeline and signature preimage validation for
  high-severity decision gates

Extension Host (franken-extension-host lib.rs, +4263 lines):
- Add Declassify capability to capability enumeration
- Refactor manifest validation error handling (Serialize-only, cleaner formatting)

Module Integration (lib.rs):
- Export receipt_verifier_pipeline, benchmark_denominator, flamegraph_pipeline,
  and extension_lifecycle_manager modules
- Extend IFC provenance index with additional tracking capabilities (+34 lines)
- Enhance feature parity tracker with expanded coverage metrics (+20 lines)
- Refine adversarial campaign, compiler policy, and frankentui adapter contracts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
